message:
chore: complete audit batch 492 — obligation ledger, mpsc channel

obligation/ledger.rs and channel/mpsc.rs both SOUND.
Token generation, leak detection, two-phase cancel-correctness verified.

Batch 492 total: 10 files audited (~22K lines), 0 bugs found.
Files: semaphore, mutex, scope/race_all, state.rs, kernel, worker,
timer driver, obligation ledger, mpsc channel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
